name: AnalysisCrossSection
summary: The AnalysisCrossSection class contains information related to analysis cross sections.

constructors.name: AnalysisCrossSection
constructors.summary: Creates a new instance of an analysis cross section.

methods.name: Delete
methods.summary: Deletes an analysis cross section. The AnalysisModelName and ID have to be set.

methods.name: Insert
methods.summary: Inserts an analysis cross section. The AnalysisModelName has to be set.

methods.name: Select
methods.summary: Selects an analysis cross section. The AnalysisModelName and ID/Name have to be set.

properties.name: A
properties.summary: The cross section area (m2) of the analysis cross section.

properties.name: AnalysisModelName
properties.summary: Gets or sets the analysis model name.

properties.name: AnalysisObjectType
properties.summary: Gets or sets the type of the analysis object.

properties.name: AnalysisSubSections
properties.summary: The subsections of the analysis cross section.

properties.name: Avy
properties.summary: The shear area for loads parallel to the Y-axis (m2) of the analysis cross section.

properties.name: Avz
properties.summary: The shear area for loads parallel to the Z-axis (m2) of the analysis cross section.

properties.name: Calculated
properties.summary: Indicates whether section values have been calculated.

properties.name: FatherObject2ID
properties.summary: Gets or sets the identifier of the father part.

properties.name: FatherObject2Type
properties.summary: Gets or sets the type of the father object.

properties.name: FatherObjectID
properties.summary: Gets or sets the identifier of the father part.

properties.name: FatherObjectType
properties.summary: Gets or sets the type of the father object.

properties.name: G
properties.summary: The mass per unit of length (kg/m) of the analysis cross section.

properties.name: ID
properties.summary: Gets or sets the identifier of the analysis object.

properties.name: It
properties.summary: The torsion moment (m4) of the analysis cross section.

properties.name: Iw
properties.summary: The warping constant (m6) of the analysis cross section.

properties.name: Iy
properties.summary: The radius of gyration about the Y-axis (m) of the analysis cross section.

properties.name: Iyy
properties.summary: The moment of inertia about the Y-axis (m4) of the analysis cross section.

properties.name: Iz
properties.summary: The radius of gyration about the Z-axis (m) of the analysis cross section.

properties.name: Izz
properties.summary: The moment of inertia about the Z-axis (m4) of the analysis cross section.

properties.name: Name
properties.summary: The name of the analysis cross section.

properties.name: Wplyy
properties.summary: The plastic modulus about the Y-axis (m3) of the analysis cross section.

properties.name: Wplzz
properties.summary: The plastic modulus about the Z-axis (m3) of the analysis cross section.

properties.name: Wyy
properties.summary: The elastic modulus about the Y-axis (m3) of the analysis cross section.

properties.name: Wzz
properties.summary: The elastic modulus about the Z-axis (m3) of the analysis cross section.
